overview: A polished personal knowledge base for collecting, organizing, and linking notes. Features a rich text editor with [[wikilinks]], automatic link detection, folder and tag organization, full-text search, SVG graph visualization, and export to Markdown or JSON.
features: Rich text note editor with headings, lists, and code blocks
[[Wikilink]] syntax for linking notes with autocomplete suggestions
SVG graph view showing connected notes with pan/zoom
Backlinks panel showing all notes that link to the current note
Sidebar with folder tree, tags, and searchable note list
Full-text search modal (Cmd/Ctrl+K) with instant filtering
Auto-save with 2-second debounce and force-save shortcut
Export notes as Markdown or JSON (single note or all notes)
Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+N, Cmd+K, Cmd+S, Cmd+Shift+L
Three-column responsive layout with dark/light mode
